notes.value: items[id][city] = {v7,a7,v30,a30}: v = mean items/day over the window, a = volume-weighted avg price. Aggregated across qualities. Missing = did not trade there.
notes.scope: T4-T8 gear (same set as baseline.json). Black Market volume stays in baseline.json.
notes.rank: app ranks by daily silver = v * a; joins name/tier/category from baseline.json
